top_signals.title: Supreme Court rulings on Fed, FTC: What they mean for consumers
top_signals.summary: The Supreme Court issued a pair of highly anticipated rulings on Monday that have far-reaching implications for household finances.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Comcast Plans to Spin Off NBCUniversal in Strategy Reversal
top_signals.summary: Comcast Corp. plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky, unwinding a strategy that began more than a decade ago after struggling to demonstrate that a cable and media conglomerate would benefit shareholders.
